<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\Search; use Predis\Command\Argument\Search\SchemaFields\FieldInterface; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; class FTALTER extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'FT.ALTER'; } public function setArguments(array $arguments) { [$index, $schema] = $arguments; $commandArguments = (!empty($arguments[2])) ? $arguments[2]->toArray() : []; $schema = array_reduce($schema, static function (array $carry, FieldInterface $field) { return array_merge($carry, $field->toArray()); }, []); array_unshift($schema, 'SCHEMA', 'ADD'); parent::setArguments(array_merge( [$index], $commandArguments, $schema )); } }
